name: WELLE Environmental Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Welle Environmental Group Co., Ltd. provides urban environmental governance, agricultural and rural environmental management, and industrial energy conservation and environmental protection plants in China. It offers urban environmental governance solutions, including landfill leachate treatment, kitchen waste disposal, river repair, and waste incineration services; agricultural and rural environmental solutions, such as agricultural organic waste treatment and rural sewage treatment services; and industrial energy saving and environmental protection solutions comprising industrial flue gas treatment, VOC oil and gas recovery, and industrial treatment services. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu WELLE Environmental Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Welle Environmental Group Co., Ltd. in March 2019. Welle Environmental Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Changzhou, China.
